hook.say: The new X-Men Ninety-Seven season will have a totally different opening sequence.
hook.show: The new X-Men '97 season will have a totally different opening sequence.

lines.say: Each episode's credits will only show the mutants actually featured in that story.
lines.show: Each episode's credits will only show the mutants actually featured in that story.

lines.say: Meaning if an episode focuses on Cable's X-Force, the jet and team lineup shift.
lines.show: Meaning if an episode focuses on Cable's X-Force, the jet and team lineup shift.

lines.say: This change directly reflects the Season One cliffhanger.
lines.show: This change directly reflects the Season 1 cliffhanger.

lines.say: The X-Men are scattered across three different timelines, per Collider.
lines.show: The X-Men are scattered across three different timelines, per Collider.

lines.say: The new credits visually reinforce who is driving each timeline's story.
lines.show: The new credits visually reinforce who is driving each timeline's story.

lines.say: Even the final shot of Professor X and Magneto will be replaced.
lines.show: Even the final shot of Professor X and Magneto will be replaced.

lines.say: Expect Cable and Apocalypse to take their place in the new season.
lines.show: Expect Cable and Apocalypse to take their place in the new season.

lines.say: X-Men Ninety-Seven Season Two hits Disney Plus in July twenty twenty-six.
lines.show: X-Men '97 Season 2 hits Disney Plus in July 2026.

lines.say: Will this creative choice make the wait for the new season even harder?
lines.show: Will this creative choice make the wait for the new season even harder?

captions.instagram: X-Men '97 Season 2 is switching up its iconic opening credits! Each episode will feature a unique sequence, highlighting only the characters central to that story. This creative choice ties directly into the Season 1 cliffhanger, with the X-Men scattered across different timelines. Will this make the wait until July 2026 even harder? Full story at The Screen Report, link in bio. #XMen97 #Marvel #DisneyPlus #Animation #TVNews #Mutants #Season2 #OpeningCredits
captions.facebook: Huge news for X-Men '97 fans! Season 2 is innovating with episode-specific opening credits, showcasing only the characters featured in each story. This is a direct nod to the Season 1 cliffhanger which left the team scattered across timelines. What do you think about this creative change? Will it make the wait for July 2026 even tougher?

pinterest.title: X-Men '97 Season 2: Dynamic Episode-Specific Opening Credits Revealed!
pinterest.description: Get ready for a game-changing experience in X-Men '97 Season 2! The new season will feature episode-specific opening credits, highlighting only the characters central to each story. This innovative approach reflects the Season 1 cliffhanger and the X-Men's scattered timelines. Premiering July 2026 on Disney Plus!

youtube.title: X-Men '97 Season 2: Opening Credits to Change Every Episode! #Shorts
youtube.description: X-Men '97 Season 2 is shaking things up with a completely new format for its opening credits! Each episode will feature a unique title sequence, showcasing only the characters central to that particular story. This creative decision directly ties into the Season 1 cliffhanger, which left the X-Men scattered across different timelines. What do you think of this dynamic change? Catch X-Men '97 Season 2 on Disney Plus in July 2026!

captions.x: X-Men '97 Season 2 is getting episode-specific opening credits! Each sequence will only show the characters featured in that story, reflecting the timeline-spanning Season 1 cliffhanger. Get ready for July 2026 on Disney Plus! Will this make the wait harder? #XMen97 #Marvel

spoken: The new X-Men Ninety-Seven season will have a totally different opening sequence. Each episode's credits will only show the mutants actually featured in that story. Meaning if an episode focuses on Cable's X-Force, the jet and team lineup shift. This change directly reflects the Season One cliffhanger. The X-Men are scattered across three different timelines, per Collider. The new credits visually reinforce who is driving each timeline's story. Even the final shot of Professor X and Magneto will be replaced. Expect Cable and Apocalypse to take their place in the new season. X-Men Ninety-Seven Season Two hits Disney Plus in July twenty twenty-six. Will this creative choice make the wait for the new season even harder?
